title: Garlicky Quick Japanese Cottage Cheese Ramen
description: A fast, garlicky ramen with creamy cottage cheese and a glassy broth, inspired by Kanto flavors and Ayurveda principles.
instructions: Bring water and chicken broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add ramen noodles and cook for 3 minutes until al dente, then drain and set aside.
In the same pan, heat sesame oil over medium heat and sauté minced garlic and grated ginger until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Deglaze the pan with soy sauce, scraping up any browned bits.
Stir in mirin, miso paste, and rice vinegar, letting the mixture simmer for 1 minute to meld flavors.
Reduce heat, then fold in cottage cheese until it melts into a creamy, glassy consistency.
Return the cooked noodles to the pan, tossing them in the garlicky broth until heated through.
Remove from heat and ladle the ramen into bowls.
Garnish with sliced green onion and serve immediately.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
